name: code-doctor
description: AI-Powered Code Review Platform with Multi-Agent Pipeline

scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && source venv/bin/activate && uvicorn main:app --reload
scripts.build: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build
scripts.vercel-build: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && python3 -m venv venv && source venv/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt
